notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Brady House grounds into a force out, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames. José Tena scores. Keibert Ruiz out at 2nd. Brady House to 1st. Brady House advances to 1st, on a missed catch error by first baseman Rafael Devers, assist to shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Brady House reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brady House reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Matt Chapman.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead lines into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Rafael Devers. Brady House out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas grounds out, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Brady House GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brady House grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Keibert Ruiz out at 2nd. Brady House out at 1st.
